microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling** capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating technical and client-facing deliverables.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the program's ability to serve more enterprise accounts.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation benchmark.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows by conducting client-facing demos and training sessions that activated utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Facilitated 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the **product roadmap** to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a top capability.

Improved data retrieval and solution quality by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% across internal technical teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly reducing operational overhead at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to pinpoint automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with real-time pipeline visibility.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — mirroring the precision required in IoT asset monitoring rollouts.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and improving system reliability across the robotics fleet.
Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process under tight delivery timelines.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through an optimized CRM process — directly paralleling HubSpot pipeline management for B2B sales cycles.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, demonstrating the ROI-focused, client-acquisition mindset central to a Sales Engineer role.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks, translating technical data into actionable business recommendations for decision-makers.
